name: IBM
brand_promise: Let's create — IBM partners with the world's organizations to put technology to work on their hardest problems.
voice_principles: Lead with the business outcome, not the technology
Be precise and substantiated — credibility over hype
Speak as a peer to senior enterprise decision-makers
Make the complex clear without dumbing it down
tone_principles: Confident and visionary in brand and thought-leadership work
Clear and technically rigorous in product and developer content
Measured and trustworthy in security, governance, and compliance topics
messaging_pillars: Enterprise-grade AI and hybrid cloud built for security, scale, and trust
Open technology (Red Hat) that modernizes without lock-in
Deep expertise that turns technology into measurable business outcomes
writing_dos: Open with the business problem or outcome, then the technology
Substantiate capability claims with evidence or proof points
Use precise, industry-correct terminology for a senior technical audience
writing_donts: Don't overstate AI autonomy or imply human oversight is unnecessary
Don't lead with speeds-and-feeds before the business value
messaging_guardrails: AI claims must emphasize governance, trust, and enterprise readiness — never overstate autonomy
Avoid hype; substantiate capability claims with evidence
Maintain an enterprise, outcome-first frame — not consumer-tech aspiration
Respect regulated-industry sensitivities (financial services, healthcare, government)
mandatories: IBM logo and approved lockups on all executions
compliance_notes: Claims made to regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, public sector) must withstand procurement and compliance scrutiny; avoid absolute security guarantees.
visual_identity_notes: The 8-bar logo and IBM Plex type are core equities; a restrained, confident enterprise aesthetic.
source: Built from public information: IBM advertising, ibm.com, and public brand expression (2024). Voice inferred from real published copy; guardrails inferred and should be confirmed against internal brand guidelines.
